options.a: Where the hydraulic force is used to overrule the aerodynamic force, by always overpowering the control surface against aerodynamic forces.
options.b: Where the hydraulic force on the control surface actuators is weaker than the aerodynamic force acting on the surface.
options.c: The mechanical system that is used to oppose the aerodynamic forces acting on a control surface.
options.d: Where the aerodynamic forces assist the hydraulic force on the control surface.
